response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer, but the profile does not match the core requirements of this role. Hands-on C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI components) plus an academic thesis project — far short of the required 5–10 years of strong C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure. RIDE Capital touches the investment space but the work there was Node/TypeScript/GraphQL, not C++ in a trading or banking system. The technical center of gravity is web/mobile/backend in JavaScript, TypeScript, and DLang, which is misaligned with this consulting engagement.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and in a low-level audio thesis project
concerns: C++ experience is roughly six months, far below the required 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge
Career focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang web and backend work, not C++ financial systems
